name: domain-driven-design-first-steps

source_quality_gate.publishable_use: summaries, ontology, relationships, and source refs only
source_quality_gate.public_knowledge_scope: concepts, relationships, coverage, and query fixtures; no source expression copy
source_quality_gate.source_ref_policy: stable source IDs and review status only; no absolute local paths

notes: This package is a study graph, not a full-text substitute for the source.
Line references point to the private OCR text generated locally.
Low-confidence OCR items should be visually reviewed before using the private source for exact wording.

max_density_second_pass.public_knowledge_scope: section-level concepts, relationships, decisions, warnings, and topic indexes
max_density_second_pass.source_expression_policy: source ideas are used; source wording, code examples, tables, and exercises are excluded

chunk_grounded_extraction.public_trace_policy: public rows store stable chunk references, line ranges, short candidate digests, and abstraction loss labels only. OCR text is excluded
